about.title: About Us
about.intro: ŞarjFiyat is an independent platform that lets EV drivers compare prices of charging station operators across Türkiye.
about.missionP1: Our mission is to provide EV users with transparent and up-to-date pricing information so they can find the most suitable charging solution. We aim to contribute to the growth of Türkiye's EV ecosystem and to help expand EV adoption.
about.missionP2: As an independent platform, we impartially compare current prices from all charging operators, helping users make informed choices.
about.contactIntro: For questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, you can reach us via:
